nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Entry-point skill document for handling captions in Remotion: defines the shared `Caption` JSON type and routes readers to sub-guides for generating, displaying, and importing captions. This is vendored Claude Code agent-skill reference documentation, not part of Versus Engine's own application source.

nodes.name: display-captions.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide explaining how to fetch, paginate, and render `Caption` arrays in a Remotion composition, covering `<Sequence>`-based rendering, white-space preservation, per-word highlighting, and overlaying captions on top of video content. Vendored external skill documentation for the Remotion captions package.

nodes.name: import-srt-captions.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for importing existing `.srt` subtitle files into a Remotion project using `parseSrt()` from `@remotion/captions`, including fetching the file via `staticFile()` or a remote URL. Vendored external skill documentation, not Versus Engine application code.

nodes.name: transcribe-captions.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for transcribing audio or video into captions using Whisper.cpp via the `@remotion/install-whisper-cpp` package, showing how to download the model, run transcription, and write the resulting caption JSON for use in Remotion. Vendored external skill documentation.
